events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a missing weld per drawing, with AWS D1.1 as reference. This is non-compliant. Work is rough-complete. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural welding missing weld). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Confidence high.
